caption: A close-up shot focuses on a mobile device displaying a software application titled "Alpha Szenszor eNose v1.0.14". The screen shows a graph plotting "Current ($\mu$A)" against "Time (s)", featuring several overlapping line plots that rise and fall in a repetitive pattern. Below the graph, a list of channels is visible, including "Channel 2" and "Channel 4", accompanied by yellow circular icons. A "STOP" button is positioned on the right side of the screen. As the sequence progresses, the camera shifts slightly, providing a clearer view of the interface. The graph continues to update in real-time, with the lines shifting as data is acquired, indicated by the text "Acquiring 5/200 (20s)" at the bottom. The device is held in a dimly lit environment, with a blurred background showing a grey surface and a glimpse of a white object.
